sky.mix.uk.title: Darts Gold: Lloyd v Van Barneveld
sky.mix.uk.description: A look back at some classic darts action. Here, then number one seed Colin Lloyd faces Raymond van Barneveld in the second round of the 2007 PDC World Darts Championship.

sky.mix.uk.title: MVG v Wade: Premier Lge 2015
sky.mix.uk.description: Revisit a classic Premier League Darts contest from the Motorpoint Arena where Michael Van Gerwen dismantled James Wade in 2015 with an average of 116.90. Contains flashing images.

sky.mix.uk.title: WTA Doha 2026 Review
sky.mix.uk.description: A review of the 2026 Qatar Open - the first WTA 1000 event of the season.

sky.mix.uk.title: ATP Final: Doha
sky.mix.uk.description: Standing between Carlos Alcaraz, in the midst of an 11-game winning run, and a maiden Qatar Open title is the resurgent Arthur Fils - playing in his first final since 2024. (21.02)

sky.mix.uk.title: WTA Final: Dubai
sky.mix.uk.description: Meeting for the first time in a final, 31-year-olds Jessica Pegula and Elina Svitolina vie for the Dubai crown. Svitolina bids to end an eight-year wait for her third title here. (21.02)

sky.mix.uk.title: Elise Christie: No Filter
sky.mix.uk.description: In December 2021, three-time Olympian Elise Christie retired from short track speed skating, broken and unwell. Elise tells her story in this Sky Sports New Focus Fund documentary.

sky.mix.uk.title: Phil Taylor's Top 5 Moments
sky.mix.uk.description: Some of darts' biggest names count down their favourite moments in the sport's history. Here, Phil 'The Power' Taylor gives his top five.

sky.mix.uk.title: Darts Gold: Part v Harrington
sky.mix.uk.description: A chance to relive some classic darts action. Here, at the 2001 PDC World Darts Championship, John Part takes on Rod Harrington in the semi-final.

sky.mix.uk.title: RVB v MVG 2016'
sky.mix.uk.description: In 2016, Michael Van Gerwen and Raymond Van Barneveld delivered a World Championship thriller on the Alexandra Palace stage. Revisit this epic encounter in London. Contains flashing images.

sky.mix.uk.title: Taylor v Painter 2004
sky.mix.uk.description: Trailing Kevin Painter 4-1, a ninth World Championship title looked out of reach for Phil Taylor. Cue a miraculous recovery and a breathtaking sudden death leg. Contains flashing images.

sky.mix.uk.title: Taylor v Wright 2017
sky.mix.uk.description: Appearing for the final time on the Winter Gardens stage, revisit Phil Taylor's World Matchplay Final with Peter Wright in 2017. Contains flashing images.

sky.mix.uk.title: Beaton v Taylor QF 2010
sky.mix.uk.description: In the quarter-final of the 2010 Grand Slam of Darts, Steve Beaton staged an incredible comeback, overcoming Phil Taylor. Contains flashing images.

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 21/22: Coventry City v Fulham
sky.mix.uk.description: In October 2021, Coventry took Fulham to the sword, putting four past the travelling west Londoners who eventually went on to secure Premier League promotion.

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 21/22: Blackburn v Fulham
sky.mix.uk.description: In a Sky Bet Championship encounter to remember for the visitors - and one to forget for the hosts - the travelling Fulham put seven unanswered goals past a hapless Blackburn at Ewood Park.

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL Play-Off Memories: 1999
sky.mix.uk.description: A chance to relive a classic play-off final from the English Football League. Here, rewind to 1999 and a memorable encounter between Gillingham and Manchester City.

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL Play-Off Memories: 1998
sky.mix.uk.description: A chance to relive a classic play-off final from the English Football League. Here, rewind to 1998, and a fascinating, pulsating eight-goal encounter between Sunderland and Charlton.

sky.mix.uk.title: ATP Final: Delray Beach
sky.mix.uk.description: Tommy Paul targets his fifth ATP Tour trophy in an all-American final at the Delray Beach Open as the fifth seed takes on countryman and fellow former finalist here, Seb Korda. (22.02)

sky.mix.uk.title: ATP Final: Rio
sky.mix.uk.description: A men's singles champion is crowned in the final of the 2026 Rio Open on the ATP Tour. (21.02)

sky.mix.uk.title: ATP/WTA Tour Classic Matches
sky.mix.uk.description: In the match that resulted in Serena Williams' 14-year boycott of Indian Wells, the 19-year-old fought Kim Clijsters in front of a volatile crowd - ultimately clinching her second title.

sky.mix.uk.title: ATP/WTA Tour Classic Matches
sky.mix.uk.description: In a five-hour, five-set Rome Open epic, an 18-year-old Rafael Nadal lit up the Foro Italico in his back-and-forth contest with Argentina's Guillermo Coria.

sky.mix.uk.title: PGA Tour Golf Highlights
sky.mix.uk.description: The final day of the AT&T Pebble Beach Pro-Am, a PGA Tour event staged in California. Rory McIlroy finished two clear of Shane Lowry to claim victory a year ago. (15.02)

sky.mix.uk.title: PL Greatest: Cardiff/Man City 2013
sky.mix.uk.description: Relive some classic action from the Premier League archive. Here, Cardiff meet Man City on a memorable afternoon in south Wales back in 2013.

sky.mix.uk.title: PL Greatest: Arsenal/Charlton 2001
sky.mix.uk.description: A chance to relive a classic match from the Premier League. Here, Arsenal take on Charlton Athletic at Highbury back in 2001 on a memorable afternoon for the Addicks.

sky.mix.uk.title: PL Greatest: Coventry/Man Utd 1997
sky.mix.uk.description: A look at the greatest Premier League game for each club, as voted for by fans. Here, for Coventry City, the stunning late comeback 3-2 win over Manchester United back in December 1997.

sky.mix.uk.title: PL Greatest:Everton/Wimbledon 1994
sky.mix.uk.description: Everton: Enjoy the greatest Premier League game for each of the league's 47 clubs, as voted for by fans. For Everton, the 3-2 win over Wimbledon in 1994 that ensured the Toffees' survival.

sky.mix.uk.title: WDC QF: Manley v Lewis
sky.mix.uk.description: During the World Championship in 2006, Peter Manley and Adrian Lewis clashed in an ill-tempered quarter-final at the Circus Tavern. Contains flashing images.

sky.mix.uk.title: 2025 Season Review
sky.mix.uk.description: As the 2025 chapter in Formula 1 history came to a close with Lando Norris claiming a maiden world championship, join the Sky Sports F1 team for an in-depth review of the season.

sky.mix.uk.title: WTA Dubai 2026 Review
sky.mix.uk.description: Enjoy an in-depth review of the 2026 Dubai Duty Free Tennis Championships - a WTA 1000 event.

sky.mix.uk.title: ATP Final: Delray Beach
sky.mix.uk.description: A men's singles champion is crowned in the final of the Delray Beach Open. (21.02)

sky.mix.uk.title: ATP Final: Rio
sky.mix.uk.description: A men's singles champion is crowned in the final of the 2026 Rio Open on the ATP Tour. (21.02)

sky.mix.uk.title: S/Lge: Toulouse v Castleford
sky.mix.uk.description: Returning to the Betfred Super League with a bang, Toulouse Olympique bid to build on an impressive round one performance as the French side welcome Castleford Tigers.

sky.mix.uk.title: My Icon: Casey Stoney
sky.mix.uk.description: In the next episode of this special series, former England captain Casey Stoney discusses the individuals that have inspired her during her life and career.

sky.mix.uk.title: My Icon: Stef Reid
sky.mix.uk.description: British Paralympian Stef Reid takes a look at some of the key individuals that have played a role in inspiring her to the top of sport.

sky.mix.uk.title: 30 Years of the PDC World Champs'
sky.mix.uk.description: In celebration of 30 years of the PDC World Darts Championship, take a look back at the very first tournament, a classic final from 2007 and one of the greatest legs ever played. Ep 1.

sky.mix.uk.title: The Taylor Years
sky.mix.uk.description: Hear from the legendary Phil Taylor as the 16-time world champion recounts his glory years at the PDC World Darts Championship. Ep 2.

sky.mix.uk.title: The Greatest Final 07:Taylor v RVB
sky.mix.uk.description: In the final act at the Circus Tavern, two of the finest players to have ever played the sport created a match for the ages, as Phil Taylor and Raymond van Barneveld met in the final. Ep 3.

BBCFourHD.uk.title: Face the Music
BBCFourHD.uk.description: Joseph Cooper invites viewers to match their musical wits against Arianna Stassinopoulos, Brian Redhead and John Bird. With guest musician Walter Susskind. [S]

BBCFourHD.uk.title: The Joy of AI
BBCFourHD.uk.description: Documentary. Jim Al-Khalili takes a look at how we've created machines that can simulate, augment, and even outperform the human mind - and why this shouldn't spook us. [S,AD] [HD]

BBCFourHD.uk.title: The Horizon Guide to AI
BBCFourHD.uk.description: Documentary looking at the perception of AI from 1964 to the present day. Can we be optimistic about all that AI can deliver - or fearful of its ability to control our lives? [S] [HD]

BBCFourHD.uk.title: Romancing the Stone: The Golden...
BBCFourHD.uk.description: ...Ages of British Sculpture. 2/3. Alastair Sooke looks at the maverick sculptors working in the 18th and 19th centuries. [S] [HD]

BBCFourHD.uk.title: The Australian Wars
BBCFourHD.uk.description: 2/3. How the growing number of European arrivals in Tasmania saw the death count grow, too. Contains some violence and some upsetting scenes. [S,AD] [HD]

BBCFourHD.uk.title: Face the Music
BBCFourHD.uk.description: Joseph Cooper invites viewers to match their musical wits against Arianna Stassinopoulos, Brian Redhead and John Bird. With guest musician Walter Susskind. [S]

BBCFourHD.uk.title: Wild China
BBCFourHD.uk.description: 6/6. Documentary series. A look at how tea-growing cultures, bird-filled wetlands and futuristic cities jostle along China's eastern seaboard in a battle for resources. [S,AD,SL]

BBCFourHD.uk.title: Yes, Prime Minister

BBCFourHD.uk.title: Ardal O'Hanlon: Tomb Raider

BBCTwoWales.uk.description: Dad Mario is worried his 18-year-old son Xavier is going off the rails. Will two days in the wild give him a wake-up call? Or does Mario have some learning of his own to do? [S,AD] [HD]

BBCTwoWales.uk.title: Escape to the Country
BBCTwoWales.uk.description: 29/50. Jules Hudson helps Sarah from Newcastle find peace and stunning views in Northumberland. [S,AD] [HD]

BBCTwoWales.uk.title: Bargain Hunt: Down on the Farm
BBCTwoWales.uk.description: In a rural special, Christina Trevanion delves into farming-related antiques and collectibles as she finds out which red and blue teams milked the most profits at auction. [S,AD] [HD]

BBCTwoWales.uk.title: Marcus Wareing Simply Provence
BBCTwoWales.uk.description: 7/15. The UK loves fruit-based classics like apple crumble. Marcus wants to discover if it's the same in France. Do they have a passion for retro recipes that rival our British favourites? [S,SL] [HD]

BBCTwoWales.uk.title: Marcus Wareing Simply Provence
BBCTwoWales.uk.description: 8/15. Marcus wants to give the French a run for their money with a twist on a classic Sunday roast using a meat beloved by the French and Brits alike - chicken. [S,SL] [HD]

BBCTwoWales.uk.title: BBC News
BBCTwoWales.uk.description: Twenty-four hours a day, the latest national and international stories as they break. [HD]

BBCTwoWales.uk.title: Snooker: Welsh Open 2026
BBCTwoWales.uk.description: Catrin Heledd introduces live coverage from day two at the 2026 Welsh Open, with Shaun Murphy, Zhao Xintong, Luca Brecel, John Higgins, Stuart Bingham and Kyren Wilson all in action. [S] [HD]

BBCTwoWales.uk.title: First Minister's Questions
BBCTwoWales.uk.description: Full coverage of MSs' questions to the first minister from the Senedd in Cardiff Bay. [S] [HD]

BBCTwoWales.uk.title: Villages by the Sea - Lindisfarne
BBCTwoWales.uk.description: Archaeologist Ben Robinson discovers the story of the monks and villagers of the Holy Island of Lindisfarne, off the Northumberland coast. [S] [HD]

BBCTwoWales.uk.title: New: Richard Osman's House of Games
BBCTwoWales.uk.description: 77/100. Michelle Ackerley, Katie Derham, Karen Hauer and Geoff Norcott test their trivia skills. [S] [HD]

BBCTwoWales.uk.title: Do You Know Your Place?

BBCTwoWales.uk.title: Snooker: Welsh Open 2026
BBCTwoWales.uk.description: Abigail Davies presents live coverage as five-time Welsh Open champion John Higgins takes on China's Liu Wenwei. [S] [HD]

BBCTwoWales.uk.description: 1/29. Four chefs compete for north west England with canapes, starters and fish dishes inspired by the British film industry. Who will be eliminated? [S,AD] [HD]

Blaze.uk.title: Storage Wars
Blaze.uk.description: Zip Tie Lies: Rene and Casey roll the dice on some sealed totes in San Bernardino, while Kenny stumbles over some odd-looking car parts and Lisa shields herself from disaster. (S14, ep 12)

Blaze.uk.title: Junk & Disorderly
Blaze.uk.description: Henry Cole gets excited as he visits automobilia heaven and the three Junketeers come together to flog restored items. (S2, ep 4)

Blaze.uk.title: Ancient Aliens

Blaze.uk.title: Close Encounters
Blaze.uk.description: Four US Air Force reservists are pursued by odd lights. Constable Alan Godfrey loses consciousness when he investigates a strange disruption in West Yorkshire. (S2, ep 11)

Blaze.uk.title: Close Encounters
Blaze.uk.description: A hitchhiker is terrified when lights appear to attack him. A sighting in France becomes one of the most investigated cases in UFO history. (S2, ep 12)

Blaze.uk.title: Pawn Stars

Blaze.uk.title: Storage Wars
Blaze.uk.description: Reign or Shine: King Darrell strives to defend his throne, but Rene and Casey signal their intentions to undermine his plans. Meanwhile, Kenny gets bowled over by his locker. (S14, ep 9)

Blaze.uk.title: Storage Wars
Blaze.uk.description: The King of Montebowl-o: Barry turns up to auction armed with a present for a certain hustler. Meanwhile, Brandi and Bozek get a firm grip on a smaller unit. (S14, ep 10)

Blaze.uk.title: New: Dickinson's Real Deal

Blaze.uk.title: New: Paranormal: Caught On Camera
Blaze.uk.description: Two hikers take refuge from a storm in a haunted hut in Scotland and a California man's canine companion calls out from the other side. (S8, ep 9)

Blaze.uk.title: New: Paranormal: Caught On Camera
Blaze.uk.description: Investigators explore a haunted, violent Tennessee prison, a piano-playing ghost appears in a NY rental and a mysterious figure is caught near a Mexican coal mine. (S8, ep 10)

Blaze.uk.title: The Proof Is Out There
Blaze.uk.description: Beastly Howls, Holloman Air Force Base UFO, and the Cabin That Defies Gravity: How does a cabin seemingly defy gravity? And what is the origin of some frightening howls? (S4, ep 5)

Channel5Plus1.uk.description: The Wise Old Elf tells Holly and Ben that no magic should be used at school. Holly finds it difficult to get by until Nanny uses magic to help her. (S1 Ep18)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Peppa Pig
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: The Aquarium: Goldie the Goldfish is feeling a little lonely, so Peppa takes her to the aquarium. (S4 Ep31)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Odo
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: An all-musical episode in which Odo, Doodle and all the campers sing and dance their way through a morning where Odo's big quest is to bake muffins for breakfast. (S2 Ep33)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Come & Play with Pip and Posy
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Pip, Posy and Jamila have so much fun looking for insects in the park that Jen challenges the Milkshakers to see what they can find by answering some fun, buggy rhymes! (Ep4)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Milkshake! Story Den
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Milo, Lofty, and Lark are transported to the jungle to become real-life explorers! What will Milo and friends discover as they go on their adventure in search of valuable treasure? (S3 Ep12)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Jeremy Vine
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Start the day with a dose of hard-hitting debate, your phone calls and a little fun - all driven by Jeremy's unique style.

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Storm & Alexis
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Two of 5's much-loved faces team up to focus on the issues that matter most to viewers - with your opinions front and centre.

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: 5 News at Lunchtime
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: National and international news.

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Matt Allwright
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Matt looks at the big news stories developing during the day and offers help and advice to save you money and make your lives a little easier.

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Vanessa
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Raw, unfiltered, authentic and personal, Vanessa Feltz wants you to tell her what's on your mind. Fiery discussions, a good giggle and plenty of afternoon gossip!

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: The Good Ship Murder
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: A murderer strikes in the shadow of Barcelona's majestic Sagrada Familia. Who has the skills to kill in this particular way? Jack and Kate investigate a crime that feels personal. (S1 Ep7/8)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: New: Bargain-Loving Brits in the Sun
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Dog rescuers Paul and Mick organise a dog walk where potential adopters can spend time with some of their rescued residents before offering them a home. (S14 Ep65)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: 5 News at 5
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Join Dan Walker and the team for the news that matters to you.

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: New: Love Nature
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: We follow Sally from Northamptonshire Badger Group as she checks on an urban badger setts tucked between houses, gardens and busy roads. (S1 Ep14)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: The Motorway
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Mayhem ensues when patrollers discover a car on the M60 leaking fuel and on fire. Plus, a four vehicle pile-up causes chaos on Spaghetti Junction. (S4 Ep4)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: New: Celebrity Puzzling
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Jeremy Vine hosts, alongside captains Sally Lindsay and Carol Vorderman, who are joined by sports broadcaster Mark Pougatch and comedian Marcus Brigstocke to tackle fiendish puzzles. (S2 Ep3)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: New: Alice Roberts: Our Hospital Through Time
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Alice uncovers Barts' centuries of medical innovation, from a high-tech, million pound surgical robot to a brutal 17th-century bladder stone operation. (Ep2)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: New: The Surgeon
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Following the work of consultant breast surgeon Sascha Dua as she runs a busy clinic offering breast cosmetic work and cancer treatment while juggling parenthood as a single mum. (Ep2/4)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: New: The Curfew
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: In a dramatic climax, the police race to save the hostages during a tense stand-off. But as the truth is finally revealed, there was more to Helen's murder than anybody knew. (Ep6/6)

UAndDavejavu.uk.description: Former winners Yasmine Akram, Stephen Mangan, Ingrid Oliver and Tom Rosenthal return to the best-selling author's tests of ingenuity and try to become a Champion of Champions. S6 Ep53

UAndDavejavu.uk.title: Richard Osman's House of Games
UAndDavejavu.uk.description: The Pointless co-host invites Ade Adepitan, Jean Johansson, Stephen Mangan and Vikki Stone to test their general knowledge skills on his not-so-pointless game show. S4 Ep3

UAndDavejavu.uk.title: QI XL
UAndDavejavu.uk.description: Gravity: Points are awarded for simply being interesting in this hit panel quiz. Barry Humphries, Bill Bailey, Rich Hall, Alan Davies and host Stephen Fry float some ideas on gravity. S7 Ep12

UAndDavejavu.uk.title: Have I Got a Bit More News for You
UAndDavejavu.uk.description: Team captains Paul Merton and Ian Hislop are joined by guest host Alexander Armstrong and panellists Dr Hannah Fry and Phil Wang. S60 Ep9

DMAXUK.uk.title: In Search Of Monsters
DMAXUK.uk.description: The Yeti. Experts investigate evidence suggesting that one of the world's most elusive figures, the Yeti, lives in America and may have an otherworldly source. S1, Ep6

DMAXUK.uk.title: Expedition X
DMAXUK.uk.description: Into The Alien Ocean. Jess and Phil's investigation into unidentified objects off Catalina Island's coast heats up after the discovery of an extra-terrestrial underwater base. S2, Ep12

DMAXUK.uk.title: Expedition X
DMAXUK.uk.description: Ghosts In The Canal. Josh wants to investigate ghostly sightings and terrifying sounds coming from an abandoned canal along the Potomac. What will they uncover? S2, Ep13

DMAXUK.uk.title: Expedition X
DMAXUK.uk.description: Terror In Appalachia. Phil and Jess venture into the Great Smoky Mountains to investigate missing hiker reports and sightings of grotesque human-like creatures. S3, Ep1

DMAXUK.uk.title: Baggage Battles
DMAXUK.uk.description: Toronto. The buyers bid against one another for lost airport items in Toronto. Mark and Billy bid for photography equipment and the Martins want a rare stamp collection. S1, Ep11

DMAXUK.uk.title: Baggage Battles
DMAXUK.uk.description: North Carolina. The buyers are in North Carolina to bid on lost, damaged and misplaced freight. They all compete for a box of war antiques, plus they bid on a cage of unknown items. S1, Ep12

DMAXUK.uk.title: Gold Divers
DMAXUK.uk.description: Bust A Move. The Kellys must find gold to pay off their debts. Shawn moves his camp in search of the motherlode, and Vernon's diver tries to mine without a light. S10, Ep25

DMAXUK.uk.title: Gold Divers
DMAXUK.uk.description: Hustle And Overflow. Shawn is driven to desperate measures to solve his water overflow problems. Meanwhile, Vernon follows the gold trail despite dangerous ice conditions. S10, Ep26

DMAXUK.uk.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
DMAXUK.uk.description: The Heli Hunters go for a remote camping trip in the Murchison region of Western Australia. Near Gwalia, rookie team the Brumbies, can't seem to catch a break. S9, Ep6

DMAXUK.uk.title: Jeremy Wade's Dark Waters
DMAXUK.uk.description: Return Of The Outback Beast. Jeremy heads to Australia to investigate an underwater attack. Could it be the work of a giant fresh water predator that many believed to be extinct? S1, Ep7

DMAXUK.uk.title: Deadliest Catch
DMAXUK.uk.description: Stay Focused Or Die. The typhoon has sunk one of the boats. But as the weather clears the fleet can't dwell on the tragedy and heads back out on the treacherous seas. S5, Ep3

DMAXUK.uk.title: Deadliest Catch
DMAXUK.uk.description: Put Up or Shut Up. It's the 2008 King Crab season in Dutch Harbour, so get prepared for more high drama on the treacherous and deadly Bering Sea. S5, Ep4

DMAXUK.uk.title: Cooper's Treasure
DMAXUK.uk.description: Dragon's Teeth. Darrell focuses on a multi-million-dollar wreck tied to Sir Francis Drake. He and his team race to locate a treacherous area identified on the map as Dragon's Teeth. S2, Ep5

DMAXUK.uk.title: Expedition Unknown
DMAXUK.uk.description: The Real Robin Hood. Josh Gates journeys across England to uncover the true story behind Robin Hood. He explores underground tunnels and finds what may be his final resting place. S2, Ep2

DMAXUK.uk.title: Expedition Unknown
DMAXUK.uk.description: England's Vanished Crown Jewels. Josh is on a quest to find the legendary lost treasure of King John. He explores the marshlands of England to find the despised king's crown jewels. S3, Ep13

DMAXUK.uk.title: Alaska: Homestead Rescue
DMAXUK.uk.description: Nevada Thirst. The Kondors' homestead turns to dust and Marty gambles everything to save it. The Raney's discover infested trailers, searing heat and sand storms. S1, Ep5

DMAXUK.uk.title: Alaska: Homestead Rescue
DMAXUK.uk.description: Bearanoia. The Raney's are called to a failing Homestead in Colorado. Plus, Don makes a 40 mile commute each day leaving Lorinda alone and terrified of the bears and mountain lions. S1, Ep6

DMAXUK.uk.title: Outback Opal Hunters
DMAXUK.uk.description: Aerial Opal Spotting. The mining season is almost over and Col's crew take one last gamble. The Cooke brothers strive to save their mega opal machine and disastrous season. S1, Ep8

DMAXUK.uk.title: Outback Opal Hunters
DMAXUK.uk.description: Rookie Mistakes. With Dan stuck at home, Justin starts the new mining season alone. He is dealt a huge blow when their rich underground mine has been pegged by another miner. S2, Ep1

DMAXUK.uk.title: Deadliest Catch
DMAXUK.uk.description: 5-Year Storm Part 1. A menacing storm moves into the fleet, with a rogue wave ripping steel at the Cape Caution. Jake, a freshman skipper, struggles to battle through the winds. S11, Ep12

DMAXUK.uk.title: Deadliest Catch
DMAXUK.uk.description: 5-Year Storm Part 2. A 600-mile-wide arctic storm continues to ravage the fleet, and rookie skippers Jake Anderson and Josh Harris struggle just to keep their heads above water. S11, Ep13

DMAXUK.uk.title: Body Bizarre
DMAXUK.uk.description: A Tiger Ate My Face. Hashmot Ali had his face torn away by a tiger, and Yulianna Yussef is covered with hundreds of hairy birthmarks. Can doctors effectively treat them? S5, Ep1

DMAXUK.uk.title: Body Bizarre
DMAXUK.uk.description: Ants In My Head. An Indian girl suffers from an infestation of ants in her ear canal. And, a Brazilian woman's tiny facial birthmark has become a huge tumour despite 19 surgeries. S5, Ep2

DMAXUK.uk.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
DMAXUK.uk.description: A game changing piece of equipment leads the Ferals to their biggest nugget haul of the season. Plus, Shane and Russell battle unseasonal weather. S6, Ep11

DMAXUK.uk.title: Naked And Afraid
DMAXUK.uk.description: Naked And Afraid Of Sharks. On a barren island in shark-infested waters, five all-star competitors must survive for 14 days. Can they live on only what the ocean provides? S5, Ep1

DMAXUK.uk.title: Salvage Dawgs
DMAXUK.uk.description: Return To The Ferry. The team returns to the Norfolk ferry to get the large items that were left behind, including a crow's nest and staircase. Mike and Robert have a consultation. S9, Ep5

DMAXUK.uk.title: Gold Divers
DMAXUK.uk.description: Texas Cold 'Em. Shawn turns to an unusual method to track down a tricky paystreak. Vernon races against weakening ice on Claim 56. Zeke makes a late move to Tomcod. S10, Ep27

DMAXUK.uk.title: Gold Divers
DMAXUK.uk.description: Yo Brother, Where Art Thou? With Kris away, Andy is under pressure to bring in gold as captain of the Reaper. Zeke tries Shawn's coordinates to finally get on the gold trail. S10, Ep28

DMAXUK.uk.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
DMAXUK.uk.description: Alan and Salty venture deep into Western Australia's Pilbara region. The Gold Devils struggling to find a reliable source of gold on their Fairlady lease. S9, Ep7

DMAXUK.uk.title: Jeremy Wade's Dark Waters
DMAXUK.uk.description: South Africa's Legendary Beast. A recent sighting of a local and bizarre beast, a kaaiman, calls Jeremy to South Africa. He hopes to uncover the facts behind this ancient myth. S1, Ep8

DMAXUK.uk.title: Deadliest Catch
DMAXUK.uk.description: Long Haul, Short Fuses. After 40 hard days at sea the pressure is on and tempers boil over on deck. And the superstitious Captain Keith is upset to have missed a herd of walruses. S5, Ep5

DMAXUK.uk.title: Deadliest Catch
DMAXUK.uk.description: Deadline. A new deadline is set - an upcoming drop in the price of king crab has the skippers rushing to finish their season. But crew battles and a fierce arctic storm block the way. S5, Ep6

DMAXUK.uk.title: Cooper's Treasure
DMAXUK.uk.description: Island Of Fortune. Darrell and the team head to a mysterious island where they discover valuable clues that lead them closer in the hunt to a 500-year-old shipwreck. S2, Ep6

DMAXUK.uk.title: Expedition Unknown
DMAXUK.uk.description: The Warrior Queen's Treasure. Josh Gates searches across England to unearth a cache of ancient treasures belonging to the legendary Celtic queen, Boudica. S6, Ep16

DMAXUK.uk.title: Expedition Unknown
DMAXUK.uk.description: The Quest For King Arthur. Josh Gates traverses England, Wales and Scotland, wading through history and legend to search for evidence of a real King Arthur. S2, Ep1

DMAXUK.uk.title: Alaska: Homestead Rescue
DMAXUK.uk.description: Wolves At The Door. The Raneys help the Johnson family who have no drinking water or food sources. Their dogs have been killed by a mystery predator and worry they are next. S1, Ep7

DMAXUK.uk.title: Alaska: Homestead Rescue
DMAXUK.uk.description: Trapped. The Raneys assist two Montana homesteaders who face being trapped on their property. When a medical emergency strikes, the Raneys face their first ever failed rescue. S1, Ep8

DMAXUK.uk.title: Outback Opal Hunters
DMAXUK.uk.description: Wild Wild West. Justin's excavator has an expensive oil leak. Plus, Col's crew are a man down and the Fire Crew are on a wild goose chase hunting a bounty of fabled fire opal. S2, Ep2

DMAXUK.uk.title: Outback Opal Hunters
DMAXUK.uk.description: Going Under. For the Rookies, there's tension as a new partner leads them on a wild goose chase underground. Plus, the Cooke Brothers' season is off to a bad and dangerous start. S2, Ep3

DMAXUK.uk.title: Deadliest Catch
DMAXUK.uk.description: Bite the Hand. A second major storm hits the fleet. While rookie skipper Jake Anderson reaches out to Sig Hansen for help, Josh Harris arrives on the grounds weeks late. S11, Ep14

DMAXUK.uk.title: Deadliest Catch
DMAXUK.uk.description: New Blood, Old Wounds. Late into Opilio season, the fleet battles against mental & physical breakdown. After deliberately defying Sig, Captain Jake Anderson has a shot at redemption. S11, Ep15

DMAXUK.uk.title: Hoffman Family Gold
DMAXUK.uk.description: Deep Mud, Deeper State. When state inspectors make a surprise visit to the mine, the Hoffman team races to save their operation before the inspectors return with a verdict. S2, Ep6

DMAXUK.uk.title: Deadliest Catch
DMAXUK.uk.description: The Purpose Of Porpoises. For the first time, Captain Sig faces a man overboard. The tide turns for Johnathan when thousands of porpoises guide the Time Bandit to new grounds. S20, Ep6

DMAXUK.uk.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
DMAXUK.uk.description: The Poseidon Crew are slowed down by fierce storms. Jacqui and Andrew encounter a deadly insect, while the Gold Timers try to fix their dry blower. S6, Ep12

DMAXUK.uk.title: Naked and Afraid XL
DMAXUK.uk.description: Heart Of Darkness. Nine series veterans try to survive the deadly jungles of Ecuador's Amazon basin for 40 days and 40 nights. Hit by injury and hunger, they're pushed to the edge. S2, Ep1

DMAXUK.uk.title: Naked and Afraid XL
DMAXUK.uk.description: What Lies Beneath. The seven remaining survivalists enter week two of their brutal challenge in the Amazon. After two tap-outs in the first four days, their priority is to find food. S2, Ep2

DMAXUK.uk.title: Salvage Dawgs
DMAXUK.uk.description: Carpenters Hall. The crew stays local and heads just down the street in Roanoke where they salvage a one-of-a-kind sign and pick through an old meeting hall. S9, Ep7

DMAXUK.uk.title: Gold Divers
DMAXUK.uk.description: Mining On A Prayer. Kris must move fast in the face of a life-threatening incident. Vernon pushes a diver for a personal record, and Shawn deals with a crack in the ice. S10, Ep29

DMAXUK.uk.title: Gold Divers
DMAXUK.uk.description: Legend Vs. Underdog. A massive blizzard is about to hit Nome, Alaska, and bring the mining season to an end. Zeke risks one last move, while Shawn hits a big jackpot. S10, Ep30

DMAXUK.uk.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
DMAXUK.uk.description: Jacqui and Andrew get trapped behind the line of a devastating bushfire. The Gold Devils are torn apart when a team member goes off on their own. S9, Ep8

DMAXUK.uk.title: The Snake Catcher
DMAXUK.uk.description: Hunt Begins, The. Julia's first mission is a giant python in a living room. Then, she tries to catch a snake trapped in an air conditioning box. S1, Ep1

DMAXUK.uk.title: Deadliest Catch
DMAXUK.uk.description: Down to the Wire. The King Crab Season comes down to the wire, as the struggling skippers battle to top off their quotas. Who will land a bumper haul in this end of season sprint? S5, Ep7

DMAXUK.uk.title: Deadliest Catch
DMAXUK.uk.description: Payback Time. It's the start of the 2009 Crab Season, and things are looking up for our spectacular skippers. But will their dreams been shattered by a colossal rogue wave? S5, Ep8

DMAXUK.uk.title: Cooper's Treasure
DMAXUK.uk.description: Into The Storm. A dangerous storm threatens to shut down the operation just as Darrell and team discover gold ore in the remains of an old wreck. S2, Ep7

DMAXUK.uk.title: Expedition Unknown
DMAXUK.uk.description: Africa's Cursed Lake Of Gold. Josh Gates journeys to the wilds of Namibia to embark on a treacherously deep dive in Lake Otjikoto for a long lost World War I treasure. S3, Ep11

DMAXUK.uk.title: Expedition Unknown
DMAXUK.uk.description: Gold Rush Of The Atlantic. Josh has a fresh lead on a shipwreck from 1715 with a potentially massive treasure haul. He launches an expedition into Florida's Atlantic coast. S6, Ep4

DMAXUK.uk.title: Alaska: Homestead Rescue
DMAXUK.uk.description: Drowning. In Hawaii the Raneys attempt to save two homesteaders whose dream homestead lays a flash-flood zone. As the weather closes in, can they save the property from the water? S1, Ep9

DMAXUK.uk.title: Alaska: Homestead Rescue
DMAXUK.uk.description: Honey I Torched The Homestead. In Oregon, the Raneys are called in to help snowbound homesteaders. Exposed to local predators, they worry about the region's forest fires. S1, Ep10

DMAXUK.uk.title: Outback Opal Hunters
DMAXUK.uk.description: Risky Business. Justin gambles thousands of dollars as he is struggling this season. Kelly is in desperate need for a big find underground and Aaron and Greg's claim might pay off. S2, Ep4

DMAXUK.uk.title: Outback Opal Hunters
DMAXUK.uk.description: Hot Hot Hot. The Rookies' relationship is on the rocks as they battle their biggest claim yet. With two partners working at different speeds, there's a fight brewing. S2, Ep5

DMAXUK.uk.title: Deadliest Catch
DMAXUK.uk.description: Beastmode. Superbowl fever hits The Cornelia Marie, an injured crewman creates jeopardy on the Wizard, the Cape Caution makes a near fatal error, and the Time Bandit loses a Captain. S11, Ep16

DMAXUK.uk.title: Deadliest Catch
DMAXUK.uk.description: I'm The Captain. The polar ice descends, threatening the end of season. Sig attempts to offload his crab before saving his gear, and Casey shows Josh what it means to be a Captain. S11, Ep17

DMAXUK.uk.description: A High Steaks Build. The crew kicks off a new waterside build, but a surprise call from the homeowners could change everything. S15, Ep2

DMAXUK.uk.description: Put To The Test. Mark and the guys make the seven-hour trek to Dubois, Indiana, to salvage a cabin picked by the youngest member of the crew. S15, Ep2

DMAXUK.uk.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
DMAXUK.uk.description: Shane and Russell gamble on a unique wash plant. The Poseidon Crew search for an ancient river gutter, while Jacqui and Andrew battle intense heat. S6, Ep13

Film4.uk.title: M3GAN
Film4.uk.description: (2022) Creepy-doll horror with Allison Williams. A robotics engineer simultaneously invents an AI dolly and takes on the care of her orphaned niece. But can a cyborg really raise a kid?

Film4.uk.title: White House Down
Film4.uk.description: (2013) All-American action thriller starring Channing Tatum and Jamie Foxx. A Capitol police officer steps up to protect the President when the White House is compromised.

Film4.uk.title: The King
Film4.uk.description: (2005) Gael Garcia Bernal plays an ex-navy rating who infiltrates pastor William Hurt's family to exact revenge for a wrong suffered by his mother. Sex/violence/strong language from start.

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: LumoTV: Getting Personal with...
Film4.uk.description: ...Abigail Gorman: Abigail is a well-known activist and campaigner. We follow her through an ADHD diagnosis and ask her what the future might hold.

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: Fixed Bayonets!
Film4.uk.description: (1951) Korean War drama about the stress of battle. Officers drop one by one as a US platoon fights a rearguard action, leaving one unwilling man (Richard Basehart) to take their place.

Film4.uk.title: Anzio
Film4.uk.description: (1968) Epic Second World War drama starring Robert Mitchum. A reporter gets trapped behind enemy lines during the costly 1944 Allied invasion of Italy. With Peter Falk and Robert Ryan.

Film4.uk.title: Decision at Sundown
Film4.uk.description: (1957) Western starring Randolph Scott and John Carroll. A man seeking revenge for his wife's death tracks his rival down in the sleepy town of Sundown...

Film4.uk.title: The Rare Breed
Film4.uk.description: (1966) Western with Maureen O'Hara and James Stewart. With the help of a drifter, a widow strives to fulfil her husband's last wish to introduce rare cattle to the perilous American west.

Film4.uk.title: Jumanji: The Next Level
Film4.uk.description: (2019) Adventure comedy sequel with Dwayne Johnson, Jack Black, Kevin Hart and Karen Gillan. The old school pals enter the Jumanji video game again to save their friend.

Film4.uk.title: Flamin' Hot
Film4.uk.description: (2023) Eva Longoria directs the real-life story of Richard Montañez - the Latino janitor who invented Flamin' Hot Cheetos, aka the 'world's most popular snack'. Starring Jesse Garcia.

Film4.uk.title: Call Jane
Film4.uk.description: (2022) Fact-based drama with Elizabeth Banks and Sigourney Weaver. An underground abortion network helps a woman with a life-threatening pregnancy in pre-Roe-v-Wade America.

Film4.uk.title: I'm Your Man
Film4.uk.description: (2021) Poignant sci-fi romantic comedy with Maren Eggert and Dan Stevens. In near-future Berlin, a lonely archaeologist helps to trial a new line in robot companions. In German/subs.

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: Crash Dive
Film4.uk.description: (1943) Second World War drama starring Tyrone Power and Anne Baxter. An ambitious naval officer falls in love with a school teacher before leaving on a dangerous submarine mission.

Film4.uk.title: Twelve O'Clock High
Film4.uk.description: (1949) World War II drama starring Gregory Peck as a US general who must treat a demoralised bomber squadron severely to restore discipline. With Oscar-winning support from Dean Jagger.

Film4.uk.title: Django Unchained Interview Special
Film4.uk.description: Director Quentin Tarantino and stars Samuel L Jackson, Christoph Waltz, Jamie Foxx and Kerry Washington talk about making the western adventure set against a backdrop of slavery.

Film4.uk.title: First Knight
Film4.uk.description: (1995) Romantic drama based on Arthurian legend, starring Richard Gere, Sean Connery and Julia Ormond. Can nomadic swordsman Lancelot contain his love for King Arthur's fiancée?

Film4.uk.title: Men in Black: International...
Film4.uk.description: ...Interview Special: Stars Chris Hemsworth and Tessa Thompson, director F Gary Gray and producers Walter Parkes and Laurie Macdonald talk about bringing the series back for a fourth part.

Film4.uk.title: Men in Black: International
Film4.uk.description: (2019) Fourth instalment of the sci-fi comedy franchise with Chris Hemsworth, Tessa Thompson and Liam Neeson. An alien-obsessed rookie joins London's Men in Black team.

Film4.uk.title: Blackberry
Film4.uk.description: (2023) Matt Johnson, Glenn Howerton and Jay Baruchel star in the frenetic, flabbergasting and mostly true story of the precipitous rise and fall of the once ubiquitous device.

Film4.uk.title: John Wick: Chapter 3 - Parabellum
Film4.uk.description: (2019) Keanu Reeves returns for the third time as the supposedly retired hitman. Someone's put a contract on John Wick's head and only a mystic in Morocco can lift it.

Film4.uk.title: Journeyman
Film4.uk.description: (2018) Paddy Considine and Jodie Whittaker star in Considine's sobering drama about a boxer who wins his world championship bout, only to be left with a serious head injury. Violence.

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: Sea Wife
Film4.uk.description: (1957) Offbeat melodrama starring Richard Burton (as an RAF officer), Joan Collins (as a nun), Basil Sydney and Cy Grant, who end up on a life raft together after their ship is torpedoed.

Film4.uk.title: The Mark of Zorro
Film4.uk.description: (1940) Swashbuckling action-adventure starring Tyrone Power. An aristocrat dons his mask and cape to fight for the rights of the poor in 19th-century California. With Basil Rathbone.

Film4.uk.title: The Major and the Minor
Film4.uk.description: (1942) Ginger Rogers stars in this comedy of romantic misadventure. A woman poses as a girl to get a cheap rail fare. But things get awkward when she falls for a man who helps her out.

Film4.uk.title: Drums Along the Mohawk
Film4.uk.description: (1939) John Ford western with Henry Fonda and Claudette Colbert. In 1776, a settler and his wife attempt to farm in the Mohawk Valley but face attacks from Native Americans and the English.

Film4.uk.title: Suffragette
Film4.uk.description: (2015) Drama exploring the increasingly defiant campaign by British women for equality and the right to vote in the years before WWI. Starring Carey Mulligan and Meryl Streep.

Film4.uk.title: Ambulance
Film4.uk.description: (2022) Michael Bay's high-octane thriller with Jake Gyllenhaal. After a bodged heist, two brothers try to evade the LAPD in an ambulance, while a paramedic operates on a cop in the back.

Film4.uk.title: Boss Level
Film4.uk.description: (2020) Groundhog day shoot 'em up with Frank Grillo, Naomi Watts and Mel Gibson. Ray gets killed every day. Can he escape by unravelling the mystery of why a bunch of people want him dead?

GBNews.uk.title: Alex Armstrong Tonight
GBNews.uk.description: Join Alex for two hours of lively debate and news making interviews. Top guests tackle the big issues of the day with Alex's fresh take on every story.

GBNews.uk.title: Alex Armstrong Tonight Late Edition
GBNews.uk.description: Tomorrow's news, tonight. All the major stories making the front pages and full coverage of all the breaking news at home and abroad with Alex Armstrong.

GBNews.uk.title: The Late Show Live
GBNews.uk.description: Live from Washington DC, Bev Turner and Ben Leo bring you the latest from the US and what it means for Britain.

GBNews.uk.title: The Camilla Tominey Show Highlights
GBNews.uk.description: Highlights from this morning. Join Camilla Tominey for a Sunday morning politics show with personality, live from Westminster.

GBNews.uk.title: Breakfast with Eamonn and Ellie
GBNews.uk.description: Join Eamonn Holmes & Ellie Costello to start your day across the United Kingdom. This is your breakfast show. Join the conversation about what is happening in our nation and the world.

GBNews.uk.title: Britain's Newsroom
GBNews.uk.description: Andrew and Miriam present Monday to Thursday mornings. When the news happens, it happens here. GB News brings you the biggest stories and the answers you need from across the UK.

GBNews.uk.title: Good Afternoon Britain
GBNews.uk.description: Tackling the big stories from all angles and perspectives. Weekdays from midday, Tom Harwood and Nana Akua bring you the most compelling stories from across the United Kingdom.

GBNews.uk.title: Martin Daubney
GBNews.uk.description: Join Martin for an up-to-the-minute take on the day's events delivered in his own unique and lively style.

GBNews.uk.title: Dewbs & Co
GBNews.uk.description: Plain-speaking, straight-talking - Michelle delivers her individual take on the day's news.

GBNews.uk.title: Farage
GBNews.uk.description: Nigel Farage doesn't hold back in his GB News prime-time show. Hear his views and give your own in an hour of discussion and debate. Join Nigel as he takes on the big stories other media won't touch.

GBNews.uk.title: Jacob Rees-Mogg's State Of The Nation
GBNews.uk.description: Join Jacob for his unique and unmissable take on the day's news.
